pattern: Count steps at which the maximum flipped index equals the number of flips applied so far.
hints: Track the running maximum of flips[0..i]; after step i+1 the string is prefix-aligned iff max == i+1.
This works because flips is a permutation: max == step count means every index 1..step has been flipped.
No explicit bit array is needed—just compare the rolling maximum to the current step index.

edge_inputs.description: already in order, aligned at every step
reverse order, aligned only on last step
two flips aligned only at end
aligned only at first and last step

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    perm = list(range(1, size + 1))
    rng.shuffle(perm)
    return [perm]
